articles.title: Bankrupt Crypto Lender Celsius Could Leave Customers Last In Line To Get Paid
articles.description: Bankrupt crypto lender Celsius Network claimed to operate like a bank, only better. However, because it was not actually a bank, many of its depositors are about to find out that they may have to wait a very long time to get reimbursed.
